title: CSS Fix for Multi-Select Row Highlighting with Colored Cells
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want multi-select row highlighting to display correctly even when cells have colored backgrounds, so that my selections are clearly visible.
description: CSS updates were needed on both `Select.php` and `Object.php` to ensure that multi-select row highlighting works properly when table cells contain colored backgrounds. Without the fix, the selection highlight was being obscured by cell-level background colors.
acceptance_criteria: Multi-select row highlighting is visible on rows with colored cells in Select.php
Multi-select row highlighting is visible on rows with colored cells in Object.php
Row selection styling takes visual precedence over cell-level background colors
ux_changes: Updated CSS on Select.php and Object.php so that multi-select row highlighting overrides cell-level background colors, making selected rows visually distinct.
implementation_notes: CSS specificity or `!important` rules were applied to ensure the selection highlight takes precedence over cell background colors on both pages.
comment_summary: Developer completed the CSS fix and submitted for review. No issues reported.
